locked.master_promise_source: Value Props v2 Part 2 — say it once, everywhere

copy.lead: Mediators, attorneys, finance and tax professionals, technology partners, and sponsoring organizations — professionals whose capacity is capped by preparation, not by judgment.
copy.substance: The neutral engine handles the symmetric intake, the citation-grounded comparison, and the organized record, so you do your own work faster and at greater scale — without lowering your standard of care. JusticeX does not become a competing forum and does not make a decision. You keep your judgment; JusticeX does the preparation and holds the record. Who leads is yours to set, by matter or by step.
copy.tier2_frame: JusticeX prepares; the professional decides. Objective comparison, not a competing forum.
copy.master_promise: Both parties reach you on the same honest picture, so the session starts where judgment matters. Truth · Fairness · Efficiency.
proof_points: Five channels, one engine: mediators, attorneys, finance & tax professionals, technology partners, sponsoring organizations.
The professional sets who leads — by matter or by step. The platform prepares; it never decides.
A defensible record: identical process for both parties, citation-grounded, with a cryptographic audit trail.

example_matter.body: One matter, seen through whichever channel you occupy. The mediator arrives with an even-handed picture; the attorney sees the same record without doing the intake twice; the financial professional works from figures that already reconcile. The preparation is shared; the judgment stays with each professional.

disclosure_block.standing_line: AI-assisted overviews · figures illustrative · not legal advice.
disclosure_block.keeps_this_honest: JusticeX is software for the objective comparison of legal disputes — not a law firm, lawyer, mediator, or arbitrator. It does not give legal advice, interpret the law, recommend a settlement, or predict an outcome. It does not refer, rate, or rank professionals. The people, with the professionals they choose, decide; court access is preserved.
disclosure_block.coverage_statement: Live today: two-party objective comparison for NY divorce & custody. Technology-partner integrations are gated. Family and commercial breadth is roadmap.

gemini_notebook_brief.subject: How the same neutral preparation serves five different professional channels without any of them ceding judgment — and why JusticeX is not a competing forum.
source_docs: value-props-v2:2.4.1–2.4.5 the five channel propositions (Appendix D, 20260716)

gtm-battlecard:objection 5 'does it replace our mediators/attorneys' (Appendix H, 20260629)
key_points: Five channels, one engine: mediators, attorneys, finance & tax professionals, technology partners, sponsoring organizations.
JusticeX prepares and holds the record; the professional keeps judgment and sets who leads.
Not a competing forum, and no referral, rating, or ranking of professionals.
gemini_notebook_brief.studio_defaults: Audio=Brief/Shorter · Video=Brief ~60–90s/Classic+custom palette · Infographic=orientation+Standard · Deck=Presenter ~8 slides PDF+PPTX
gemini_notebook_brief.disclosure_line: AI-assisted overviews · figures illustrative · not legal advice.

higgsfield_brief.art_direction: Documentary, monochrome-leaning, calm; hexagon motif; five empty professional workspaces sharing one consistent raking light — the shared preparation, the separate judgments. No faces, no gavel. No professional credentials, diplomas, or bar insignia on walls.
higgsfield_brief.negative_constraints: no fabricated human faces; no scales/gavel/courtroom; no stock handshakes; no off-palette

avatar.disclosure: AI-assisted presenter — shown at first exposure (EU AI Act Art. 50).

governance.notes: P2 fan-out, hubs-first (Inventory Ref 13). Copy DRAFTED by Claude from Value Props v2 §3.2 + the Positioning Canon — §3.2 defines inherited context, not hub page copy. The 'no referral, rating, or ranking' line is load-bearing for RPC 7.2/5.4 and the no-fee Counsel Partner Program; do not soften it. Technology-partner coverage is Gated — confirm the hub does not imply an available integration before publish.
